description: Bifolio of accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. Some of the section headings are for days of the week. Reused for various jottings including the qaddish, little circles (geomancy?), and someone's name (Bū ʿImrān b. al-Shaykh [...]).
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
